title: All Leads Open
caption: Detective Park had a suspect: the cat lady three streets over. His evidence was vibes and a questionable theory about cats, birds, and seeds. Chloe thanked him and diplomatically closed his notepad. She would not be keeping this lead open.
story_notes: Detective Park's prime suspect is the neighbourhood cat lady, based purely on vibes. Chloe sets this aside with maximum diplomacy.
